fewShots.question: 今、品質異常は出ている？どの製品・ロット・ステーション？
fewShots.query:
SELECT TOP 25 product_number AS [product], lot_id AS [lot], station_id AS [station], SUM(CASE WHEN status='fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS [fails], COUNT(*) AS [total], ROUND(MAX(torque_nm),2) AS [max_torque], ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status='fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS float)/COUNT(*),3) AS [defect_rate]
FROM dbo.Telemetry
WHERE EventEnqueuedUtcTime > (SELECT DATEADD(minute,-30,MAX(EventEnqueuedUtcTime)) FROM dbo.Telemetry)
GROUP BY product_number, lot_id, station_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 AND CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status='fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS float)/COUNT(*) > 0.2
ORDER BY [defect_rate] DESC

fewShots.question: トルクが規格上限(50Nm)を超えたイベントを直近で。
fewShots.query:
SELECT TOP 25 EventEnqueuedUtcTime AS [event_time], line_id AS [line], station_id AS [station], product_number AS [product], lot_id AS [lot], ROUND(torque_nm,2) AS [torque_nm], status
FROM dbo.Telemetry
WHERE torque_nm > 50.0 AND EventEnqueuedUtcTime > (SELECT DATEADD(hour,-24,MAX(EventEnqueuedUtcTime)) FROM dbo.Telemetry)
ORDER BY EventEnqueuedUtcTime DESC

fewShots.question: Contoso の進行中の受注を一覧で。出荷予定日と状態も。
fewShots.query:
SELECT TOP 25 fo.msdyn_name AS [order_no], fo.msdyn_customername AS [customer], fo.msdyn_iomstatename AS [state], fod.msdyn_productname AS [product], fod.msdyn_invoiceqty AS [qty], fo.msdyn_plannedshipmentdate AS [planned_ship], fo.msdyn_shiptocountry AS [ship_to_country]
FROM dbo.ERP_FulfillmentOrder AS fo
JOIN dbo.ERP_FulfillmentOrderDetail AS fod ON fo.msdyn_fulfillmentorderid = fod.msdyn_fulfillmentid
WHERE fo.msdyn_customername LIKE '%Contoso%' AND fo.msdyn_iomstatename NOT IN ('Shipped','Cancelled','Closed')
ORDER BY fo.msdyn_plannedshipmentdate ASC

fewShots.question: 進行中の受注を顧客別の件数で教えて。
fewShots.query:
SELECT TOP 25 fo.msdyn_customername AS [customer], COUNT(*) AS [order_count]
FROM dbo.ERP_FulfillmentOrder AS fo
WHERE fo.msdyn_iomstatename NOT IN ('Shipped','Cancelled','Closed')
GROUP BY fo.msdyn_customername
ORDER BY [order_count] DESC

fewShots.question: 今 品質異常が出ている製品について、進行中の出荷オーダー（顧客・出荷予定）を出して。
fewShots.query:
WITH anomaly_products AS (
  SELECT product_number
  FROM dbo.Telemetry
  WHERE EventEnqueuedUtcTime > (SELECT DATEADD(minute,-30,MAX(EventEnqueuedUtcTime)) FROM dbo.Telemetry)
  GROUP BY product_number
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 AND CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status='fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS float)/COUNT(*) > 0.2
),
product_bridge AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT msdyn_productnumber, msdyn_productid, msdyn_productidname
  FROM dbo.ERP_ReturnOrderDetail
)
SELECT TOP 25 ap.product_number AS [product_code], pb.msdyn_productidname AS [product], fo.msdyn_name AS [order_no], fo.msdyn_iomstatename AS [state], fo.msdyn_customername AS [customer], fo.msdyn_plannedshipmentdate AS [planned_ship], fo.msdyn_shiptocountry AS [ship_to_country]
FROM anomaly_products ap
JOIN product_bridge pb ON ap.product_number = pb.msdyn_productnumber
JOIN dbo.ERP_FulfillmentOrderDetail fod ON pb.msdyn_productid = fod.msdyn_product
JOIN dbo.ERP_FulfillmentOrder fo ON fod.msdyn_fulfillmentid = fo.msdyn_fulfillmentorderid
WHERE fo.msdyn_iomstatename NOT IN ('Shipped','Cancelled','Closed')
ORDER BY fo.msdyn_plannedshipmentdate ASC

fewShots.question: 品質異常が出ている製品は過去に返品されている？返品理由は？
fewShots.query:
WITH anomaly_products AS (
  SELECT product_number
  FROM dbo.Telemetry
  WHERE EventEnqueuedUtcTime > (SELECT DATEADD(minute,-30,MAX(EventEnqueuedUtcTime)) FROM dbo.Telemetry)
  GROUP BY product_number
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 AND CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN status='fail' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS float)/COUNT(*) > 0.2
)
SELECT TOP 25 rod.msdyn_productnumber AS [product_code], MAX(rod.msdyn_productidname) AS [product], rod.msdyn_returnreasonv2 AS [reason], COUNT(*) AS [return_lines]
FROM anomaly_products ap
JOIN dbo.ERP_ReturnOrderDetail rod ON ap.product_number = rod.msdyn_productnumber
GROUP BY rod.msdyn_productnumber, rod.msdyn_returnreasonv2
ORDER BY [return_lines] DESC

fewShots.question: 製品コード CRCA の未出荷オーダー（顧客・出荷予定日）を出して。
fewShots.query:
SELECT TOP 25 fo.msdyn_name AS [order_no], fo.msdyn_customername AS [customer], fo.msdyn_iomstatename AS [state], rod.msdyn_productidname AS [product], fo.msdyn_plannedshipmentdate AS [planned_ship]
FROM dbo.ERP_ReturnOrderDetail AS rod
JOIN dbo.ERP_FulfillmentOrderDetail AS fod ON rod.msdyn_productid = fod.msdyn_product
JOIN dbo.ERP_FulfillmentOrder AS fo ON fod.msdyn_fulfillmentid = fo.msdyn_fulfillmentorderid
WHERE rod.msdyn_productnumber = 'CRCA' AND fo.msdyn_iomstatename NOT IN ('Shipped','Cancelled','Closed')
ORDER BY fo.msdyn_plannedshipmentdate ASC
